code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
let sep = string.from_byte(1)
mut seen = sep
mut count = 0
mut start = 0 - 1
mut i = 0
while i < n
  mut b = 0
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(v)
    b = v
  when None
    b = 0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
  if is_ws
    if start >= 0
      let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
      let key = "#{tok}#{sep}"
      if not string.contains(seen, key)
        seen = "#{seen}#{key}"
        count = count + 1
      end
      start = 0 - 1
    end
  else
    if start < 0
      start = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start >= 0
  let tok = string.substring(input, start, n)
  let key = "#{tok}#{sep}"
  if not string.contains(seen, key)
    count = count + 1
  end
end
println("unique=#{count}")
